name: Elevated Toxic Gas Concentration
message: Toxic/combustible gas concentration exceeds 50 ppm. Increase ventilation and continuous gas monitoring required before work continues.

name: Critical Toxic Gas Concentration
message: Gas concentration exceeds 100 ppm. STOP WORK immediately, evacuate the zone and isolate the source.

name: Oxygen Enrichment Hazard
message: Oxygen level above 23.5% creates fire/explosion risk. Purge the enriched atmosphere before entry or hot work.

name: Oxygen Deficiency Warning Band
message: Oxygen between 18.0% and 19.5% is below the safe entry threshold. Ventilate and re-test before allowing continued occupancy.

name: Critical Oxygen Deficiency
message: Oxygen below 18.0% is immediately dangerous to life. Evacuate and do not enter without SCBA.

name: Confined Space Entry Without Standby Rescue Team
message: Confined space entry is prohibited without a standby rescue team. Deploy rescue team before entry.

name: High Temperature During Hot Work
message: Ambient temperature above 45C during hot work increases heat-stress and ignition risk. Schedule frequent breaks and monitor workers.

name: Extreme Ambient Heat
message: Ambient temperature above 55C exceeds safe working limits. Suspend work until conditions improve.

name: Hot Work With Detectable Gas
message: Detectable gas present during hot work. Re-test atmosphere and maintain fire watch before proceeding.

name: Hot Work With Flammable Gas Present
message: Hot work with gas concentration above 50 ppm poses explosion risk. Cancel hot work permit and eliminate the gas source.

name: Confined Space Overcrowding
message: More than 2 workers inside a confined space complicates rescue. Limit simultaneous entrants.

name: Work Without Active Permit
message: Workers present in the zone with no active work permit. Issue and validate a permit before any work.

name: Electrical Work In High Humidity
message: Humidity above 85% during electrical work increases shock risk. Verify insulation and use ELCB protection.

name: Sub-Atmospheric Pressure Hazard
message: Pressure below 0.90 bar may indicate a vacuum condition or leak. Investigate before continued work.

name: Overpressure Condition
message: Pressure above 2.0 bar detected. Verify relief systems and depressurize before intrusive work.

name: Excavation Crew Size Limit
message: Excavation with more than 6 workers requires an additional supervisor and shoring review.

name: Cold Work Near Detectable Gas
message: Gas concentration above 30 ppm during cold work. Increase monitoring frequency and ventilation.

name: High Personnel Density In Zone
message: More than 10 workers in a single zone. Confirm muster capacity and emergency egress.

name: Unrecognized Permit Type
message: Permit type is not one of the recognized categories. Verify permit classification with the issuing authority.

name: Gas Displacement Of Oxygen
message: Elevated gas (>40 ppm) combined with oxygen below 19.5% indicates oxygen displacement. Evacuate immediately and ventilate the zone.
